entries.title: Bellhouse Ordinary Public Strike
entries.trigger: An authorized public Bellhouse strike commits through a visible mechanism or event.
entries.purpose: Establish the recognizable Bellhouse family and confirm a public strike without implying automatic defeat or hidden faction state.
sonic_requirements: Recognizable on modest television speakers
Long resonance remains duckable under dialogue
Pitch identity must support related extra-ring and warning variants
The strike does not imply death, prophecy certainty, or hidden allegiance
negative_constraints: No stock church bell used unchanged

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce impact-to-tail contrast and low resonance while retaining the bell's harmonic identity and public strike timing.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original maritime Bellhouse strike: aged oxidized bronze or brass bell, firm but restrained clapper impact, swollen timber tower response, rope movement, unstable salt-air harmonics, controlled six-second decay, ominous and tactile rather than grand, no music, no church service, designed for television speakers.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: cathedral bell, church service, musical chord, cinematic boom, stock bell unchanged, extreme sub bass, hidden traitor cue, death knell cliché, speech
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Every Bellhouse sound shares oxidized brass, rope, wet timber, indexed names, and a mechanically ordered but damaged resonance.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature SFX brief only; no final bell identity, loudness, spatialization, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Unresolved Extra Ring
entries.trigger: The public Bellhouse count exceeds the visible active-seat count through the authored unresolved-position event.
entries.purpose: Communicate one additional unresolved index position without identifying a hidden player or using a simple louder or reversed bell.
layers: Wet glass or rope replacement harmonic
Second decay arriving from an impossible reflection
sonic_requirements: Clearly related to DH-AUD-SFX-001
Mechanically wrong without becoming comic or synthetic
No spatial or tonal feature identifies one stable seat
Spooky emphasizes mystery; Grim emphasizes pressure; Gore & Dread adds localized wet resonance without added loudness
negative_constraints: No louder copy of the ordinary bell

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Preserve the wrong harmonic and double-decay relationship while reducing peak and tail contrast.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original unresolved extra ring derived from an aged maritime Bellhouse bell: same oxidized brass body as the ordinary strike, but with a partial impact arriving before itself, one missing harmonic replaced by wet cloudy glass and tensioned rope, a second decay reflecting from an impossible direction, elegant supernatural wrongness, no speech, no music, no jump-scare loudness.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: simple reverse bell, louder duplicate, spoken name, hidden player cue, musical sting, comedy, sci-fi effect, extreme jump scare, cathedral bell
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The extra ring is the Bellhouse family behaving incorrectly around one unresolved index position, never a secret-traitor identifier.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature SFX brief only; no final extra-ring identity, hidden-state behavior, mix, or production approval.

entries.title: Ledger Name Index Commit
entries.trigger: A public seat name or public state marker is authoritatively indexed into the Bellhouse Ledger.
entries.purpose: Confirm a public ledger mutation through paper, ink, brass, and rope without representing guaranteed prophecy or revealing private state.
sonic_requirements: Readable as a record change rather than magic
Short enough not to interrupt repeated public indexing
Supports controlled variation
Never includes a spoken name or private marker

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce scrape and tab transient contrast while retaining the paper-to-brass record-change sequence.

generator_guidance.prompt: Short original sound of a public name being indexed into a swollen maritime ledger: thick wet paper flex, feathered dark ink scraping through fibers, one oxidized-brass index tab moving, restrained rope and tower response, tactile historical mechanism rather than magic, no speech, no bell toll, no music.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: quill writing cliché, magical sparkle, spoken name, secret clue, cash register, UI beep, full bell strike, music, fantasy spellbook
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The Ledger records public possibilities through swollen paper, feathered ink, oxidized brass, and Bellhouse rope mechanics.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature SFX brief only; no final Ledger symbols, UI, timing, mix, or production approval.

entries.title: Lighthouse Lens Rotation Commit
entries.trigger: A public lighthouse direction or operation change commits.
entries.purpose: Confirm that the memory-guidance lens has begun or completed an authorized rotation without sounding technological or musical.
sonic_requirements: Supports start and stop edit points
Mechanism sounds heavy and deliberate
Beam texture remains tactile rather than electronic
No hidden ending result is implied

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce glass-pressure and click peaks while retaining the heavy rotation and directional completion.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original lighthouse lens rotation sound for a storybook memory-guidance mechanism: thick cloudy cracked glass under pressure, heavy oxidized-brass rings moving, sparse indexed clicks, old bearing friction, a restrained tactile beam sweep, deliberate and ominous, no electronics, no music, no hidden ending reveal.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: laser, sci-fi servo, reactor, steampunk clockwork overload, musical chord, glass screech, hidden ending clue, trailer rise, speech
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The lighthouse guides memory through thick damaged glass, ordered brass indexes, old bearings, and restrained directional amber light.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature SFX brief only; no final lens behavior, ending meaning, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Rope Rescue Under Load
entries.trigger: A validated public rope rescue or stabilization action commits.
entries.purpose: Confirm load, strain, and successful support without implying that all future route risk is removed.
layers: Short human or load movement without speech
sonic_requirements: Successful hold is distinguishable from imminent failure
Several variations prevent repeated-action fatigue
No cue implies permanent route stabilization unless the public state confirms it

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce rope and anchor transient contrast while preserving the successful-load sequence.

generator_guidance.prompt: Short tactile rescue sound: salt-stiff rope tightening under heavy load, wet timber anchor responding, restrained body or cargo movement, then a controlled successful hold, maritime storybook horror, practical rather than heroic, no speech, no music, multiple editable variations.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: rope snapping, shouting, heroic flourish, musical sting, comedy, dry nylon rope, permanent safety cue, extreme impact
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Rope actions use salt-stiff fiber, wet timber, visible load, and mechanically honest success or danger states.

entries.approval_boundary: Interaction SFX brief only; no final rescue timing, route state, mix, or production approval.

entries.title: Lifeboat Launch Commit
entries.trigger: A public lifeboat launch action commits with valid capacity and route state.
entries.purpose: Confirm that the prepared craft enters its authorized water route without implying escape has already succeeded.
sonic_requirements: Launch is distinct from final escape
Capacity or passenger information remains visual
No triumphant resolution
Supports route-specific tail editing

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce hull and ramp impacts while preserving rope release and first-water contact.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original small wooden lifeboat launch in a drowned harbor: swollen hull shifts down wet timber supports, launch ramp strains, mooring rope releases, the boat meets black water with restrained displacement, practical and ominous, no engine, no voices, no victory music, not a completed escape.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: victory fanfare, motorboat, large ship launch, cheering, shouting, completed escape cue, music, trailer impact, comedy
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The lifeboat is a small wet wooden rescue craft under rope, capacity, and route pressure, never an automatic victory symbol.

required_record: boat, rope, water, and timber source licenses

entries.approval_boundary: Interaction SFX brief only; no final launch, escape, capacity, mix, or production approval.

entries.title: Current Takes Public Item
entries.trigger: A validated current hazard moves a named public item from its prior location.
entries.purpose: Support the visible item relocation with water, object, and route motion without suggesting destruction when recovery remains possible.
sonic_requirements: Movement direction may support the visible route but is never the only locator
Cue does not imply destruction unless a separate public effect commits
Object category variations remain governable

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce surge and contact peaks while preserving the object-movement sequence.

generator_guidance.prompt: Short localized sound of a recoverable public object being taken by a current in a flooded timber street: restrained water surge, object scrape or lift, movement through shallow black water, distant recoverable contact, clear but not destructive, no speech, no magic, no oversized wave.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: object shatter, teleport, giant wave, spoken item name, comedy splash, magical sparkle, destruction cue, music
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Water moves public objects through authored routes while preserving recoverability unless a separate visible state destroys them.

entries.approval_boundary: Hazard SFX brief only; no final item movement, route, destruction, mix, or production approval.

entries.title: Street Gives Way Warning and Collapse
entries.trigger: A named public space enters the authored instability warning or collapse resolution.
entries.purpose: Provide separable warning and resolution components so players can distinguish imminent danger from committed collapse.
layers: Stone crack and wet timber shift warning
sonic_requirements: Warning component is editable and clearly precedes resolution
A legal response window is never masked by a premature destruction sound
Profile variants alter physical detail rather than timing or volume
No active seat is implied defeated solely by the collapse cue

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Compress collapse impacts and preserve the warning-to-resolution distinction.

generator_guidance.prompt: Two-part editable hazard sound for a flooded storybook harbor street: first a clear warning of stone cracking, wet timber shifting, and water pressure entering; then an optional committed collapse with restrained debris and route-state tail, tense but not explosively loud, no music, no automatic death cue.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: instant demolition, explosion, jump scare, player death scream, musical sting, hidden route clue, skyscraper collapse, excessive sub bass
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Public hazards warn before irreversible resolution whenever authored rules allow a response window.

required_record: stone, timber, water, and debris source licenses

entries.approval_boundary: Hazard SFX brief only; no final warning window, collapse result, loudness, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Drowned Archive Collapse
entries.trigger: The authored Drowned Archive collapse window begins or resolves publicly.
entries.purpose: Represent shelves, paper, water, brass, and overhead structure failing around several still-readable objectives.
sonic_requirements: Supports a warning phase and a committed collapse phase
Does not imply every objective was lost
Paper remains audible within structural failure
Gore & Dread may add body-adjacent detail only when a public trapped-resident state exists

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce structural peaks and debris density while preserving paper, brass, water, and collapse-phase timing.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original two-phase collapse sound inside a Drowned Archive: wet shelves and ceiling strain, swollen maritime records falling into black water, oxidized-brass binding mechanism distorting, restrained interior water displacement, several objectives still physically present, storybook folk horror, no magic, no music, no total-failure implication.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: magical library explosion, total objective failure, screaming crowd, cinematic detonation, music, choir, hidden correct choice, excessive sub bass
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: The Archive fails through swollen paper, wet timber, black water, and ordered brass while preserving mechanically honest remaining choices.

required_record: paper, structure, water, and brass source provenance

entries.approval_boundary: Signature collapse brief only; no final objective result, mix, content intensity, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: High Water Terror Turn Signature
entries.trigger: The High Water Terror Turn validates and commits before the transformed public board becomes active.
entries.purpose: Create the Tale's defining audio transition from exposed low-tide town to active flooded route network without relying on a generic trailer impact.
layers: Water entering streets in an impossible directional sequence
Brief silence before transformed ambience begins
sonic_requirements: Unique enough to identify Drowned Harbor's signature Terror Turn
Mechanically communicates committed board transformation
Ends with room for the Underteller's post-turn line
Profiles alter texture and body detail without changing transition duration or loudness hierarchy
negative_constraints: No excessive loudness used as the primary scare

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Compress peak transitions, reduce concurrent debris layers, and preserve the bell-water-lighthouse sequence and final silence.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original eleven-second signature Terror Turn for Drowned Harbor: oxidized Bellhouse strike under pressure, water entering exposed streets in an impossible ordered sequence, salt-stiff ropes and docks taking load, cloudy lighthouse glass and brass answering, then a brief authored silence before flooded-street ambience begins, tactile storybook maritime horror, no music, no trailer boom, no tsunami, no speech.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: trailer boom, cinematic braam, musical drop, tsunami, screaming crowd, automatic death, hidden route clue, extreme loudness, sci-fi effect, copyrighted melody
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: High Water joins every signature material family—bell, water, rope, timber, glass, and brass—into one mechanically truthful board-transformation event.

entries.approval_boundary: Signature transition brief only; no final Terror Turn timing, mix, animation synchronization, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Bellmarked Public Reveal
entries.trigger: A Bellmarked allegiance reveal commits through an authorized public mechanism.
entries.purpose: Reveal public Bellmarked allegiance using the bell, ledger, and Harbor signal families without exposing any faction state before commitment.
sonic_requirements: Never plays before public reveal commitment
Does not imply all Bellmarked share the same objective
Readable without overwhelming the reveal text
No seat location is encoded beyond the visible public state

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce harmonic and mark transients while preserving the bell-ledger-signal reveal sequence.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original public Bellmarked reveal cue after authorized commitment: a contained oxidized Bellhouse harmonic opens, a swollen ledger mark indexes, and a restrained Harbor signal answers, elegant and morally ambiguous rather than villainous, short and readable beneath public reveal text, no speech, no music, no traitor alarm.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: traitor alarm, villain fanfare, secret motif, spoken faction name, musical sting, hostile attack cue, jump scare, sci-fi alert
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Bellmarked preservation is revealed through the same bell, ledger, and signal mechanism, with moral ambiguity rather than a generic evil cue.

required_record: relationship to bell and ledger family

entries.approval_boundary: Signature reveal brief only; no final faction identity, hidden-state behavior, mix, implementation, or production approval.

entries.title: Tidebound Public Transformation
entries.trigger: An eligible Tidebound transformation commits and becomes public.
entries.purpose: Communicate preserved stable-seat continuity and altered public form through water, breath, clothing, and doubled memory without generic zombie or sea-monster audio.
layers: Water leaving or entering the body in an impossible direction
Doubled nonverbal breath or body timing
sonic_requirements: Transformation sounds active and agentic rather than mindless
Original seat identity remains represented through retained material cues
No intelligible memory dialogue
Profiles add physical intensity without louder scare peaks or longer timing

accessibility.reduced_dynamics_behavior: Reduce body and water peak contrast while preserving retained-seat, doubled-memory, and active-form completion cues.

generator_guidance.prompt: Original Tidebound public transformation cue: water moves through a living body in an impossible direction, wet clothing and familiar movement preserve the original seat identity, doubled nonverbal breath and body timing suggest several trapped memories, a restrained Harbor resonance settles into an active intelligent posture, storybook maritime body horror, no speech, no music, no zombie or fish-monster sound.
generator_guidance.negative_prompt: zombie growl, fish monster, tentacles, spoken memories, villain sting, sexualized body horror, jump scare peak, musical transformation, superhero power-up
generator_guidance.consistency_anchor: Tidebound forms remain strategic stable seats whose retained human materials are layered with water-pulled memory rather than replaced by generic monsters.

required_record: water, clothing, breath, and body source provenance

entries.approval_boundary: Signature transformation brief only; no final anatomy, content rating, mix, implementation, or production approval.
